prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次依次约9313→17782→12917→21431→19507名，整体波动较大。2022年因试卷难度变化位次大幅后移，2023年有所回升，2024 年受新高考模式切换影响位次进一步后移至21431，2025年小幅前移至19507名，近两年呈震荡企稳态势。2025年基准位次约19507名；该校在黑龙江省物理类（ 含理科）招生计划：2021年94人、2022年90人、2023年88人、2024年82人、2025年83人，近年呈小幅缩减后趋稳。2026年计划87人，较2025年增加4人，扩招约4.8%， 扩招幅度适中，理论上使竞争略有加剧，位次有后移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国矿业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第67名，近年排名在54–67之 间小幅波动，整体层次稳定，属于中上游211院校；2023年高考周期声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第68位（评价为一般），短视频曝光 量处于211院校中等水平，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；历史投档异常记录中无该校断档信号，报考心理预期平稳；安全科学与工程获评A+（全国顶尖），测 绘科学与技术A-，土木工程A-。安全科学与工程类、测绘类、土木类等专业与优势学科直接对应，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/ 通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续偏高（2024年均为高热推荐），该校物理类招生涵盖上述热门专业，有助于维持报考热度。黑龙江省2026年普通高考总人数约167000人，较20 25年总人数（约172114人）略有下降，竞争压力略有缓解，2025年物理类本科批360分，特殊类型招生控制线472分，近年省控线基本稳定；中 国矿业大学位于江苏省徐州市，非黑龙江省本地高校，无本省招生倾斜；该校在黑龙江招生占比约2.2%（2025年），属外省招生中等规模，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次19507名、2026年扩招4.8%带来的竞争加剧压力、考生总数略降的缓解作用，以及热门工科专业持续高热的支撑，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次较2025 年小幅后移。，结合考生规模略降的缓解效应做有限修正，预测最低位次约20021名，波动区间19521–20521名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 9313 → 17782 → 12917 → 21431 → 19507, showing significant fluctuations. In 2022, due to changes in exam difficulty, rankings dropped sharply; in 2023, they rebounded; in 2024, affected by the new college entrance exam model, rankings further dropped to 21431; in 2025, they slightly improved to 19507, showing a stabilizing trend in recent two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 19507. The enrollment plan for Physics Category (including Science) in Heilongjiang Province: 2021: 94, 2022: 90, 2023: 88, 2024: 82, 2025: 83, showing a slight reduction followed by stabilization. The 2026 plan is 87, an increase of 4 from 2025, an expansion of about 4.8%, which is moderate, theoretically intensifying competition and putting pressure on rankings to drop.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Mining and Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it is approximately 67th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 54 and 67, maintaining a stable level as a mid-to-upper tier 211 institution; during the 2023 college entrance exam cycle, its reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; its Douyin popularity ranking is 68th (rated as average), with short video exposure at a medium level among 211 universities, showing no significant signs of increased application interest; there are no records of enrollment gaps in historical admission anomalies, indicating stable application expectations; Safety Science and Engineering is rated A+ (top in the country), Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A-. Majors such as Safety Science and Engineering, Surveying and Mapping, and Civil Engineering directly correspond to advantageous disciplines, strongly attracting students interested in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity (all highly recommended in 2024). The university's Physics Category enrollment includes these popular majors, helping maintain application heat. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Heilongjiang Province is approximately 167,000, slightly down from 2025 (about 172,114), easing competition pressure. In 2025, the Physics Category undergraduate batch line is 360 points, and the special type enrollment control line is 472 points, with provincial control lines remaining stable in recent years. China University of Mining and Technology is located in Xuzhou, Jiangsu Province, not a local university in Heilongjiang, so there is no provincial enrollment preference. The university's enrollment proportion in Heilongjiang is about 2.2% (2025), a medium scale for out-of-province enrollment, with limited regional preference influence.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 19507, the intensified competition from a 4.8% enrollment expansion in 2026, the slight relief from a decrease in total examinees, and the sustained high popularity of popular engineering majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly drop compared to 2025. With limited correction from the slight decrease in examinee numbers, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 20021, with a fluctuation range of 19521–20521.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 20021, fluctuation range 19521–20521. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of 19521 can focus on Tier 1 popular majors (Electrical, Computer, Electronic Information); those around 20000 are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors (Automation, Robotics, Energy and Power, Mathematics, etc.), while also considering borderline Tier 1 majors; those near the upper limit of 20521 are advised to secure Tier 3 advantageous discipline majors (Safety Science and Engineering A+, Surveying and Mapping A-, Civil Engineering A-, etc.), while also paying attention to CUMT's flagship majors like Mining.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were approximately 1830 → 1729 → 1504 → 2101 → 2112. From 2021 to 2023, there was a slight upward trend (from 1830 to 1504). In 2024, due to the switch to the new college entrance examination model, the ranking moved back to 2101, and in 2025 it remained basically stable at 2112, stabilizing in the last two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 2112. The university's enrollment plan for History Category (including Liberal Arts) in Heilongjiang Province: 12 students in 2021, 7 in 2022, 6 in 2023, 12 in 2024, and 14 in 2025, showing an expansion trend in recent years. The 2026 plan is 13 students, a decrease of 1 from 2025, a reduction of about 7.1%, which is relatively small, theoretically easing competition slightly and allowing room for the ranking to move forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Mining and Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; it ranks approximately 67th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in recent years, making it a mid-to-upper tier 211 university, which also has brand appeal for liberal arts students. During the 2023 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; its Douyin popularity ranking was 68th (rated as average), with moderate overall exposure; there were no signals of admission gaps in historical abnormal admission records, indicating stable psychological expectations for applicants. The university's advantageous disciplines (Safety Science and Engineering A+, Surveying and Mapping A-, Civil Engineering A-) are mainly engineering-oriented, with no direct disciplinary mapping to the History Category enrollment majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Law, Business Administration, Public Administration, Foreign Languages and Literature, etc.), so the pulling effect of advantageous disciplines on liberal arts major applications is limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially hot (recommended), Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese is hot and recommended, Economics and Trade is divided and wait-and-see, Foreign Languages is generally wait-and-see. The overall popularity of liberal arts majors is stable, with no obvious warming or cooling trends. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Heilongjiang Province general college entrance examination is approximately 167,000, slightly lower than in 2025, easing competition pressure slightly. Regarding provincial control lines, the 2025 History Category undergraduate batch line is 405 points, and the special type admission control line is 480 points, basically stable in recent years. China University of Mining and Technology is located in Xuzhou City, Jiangsu Province, not a local university in Heilongjiang Province; its enrollment scale in Heilongjiang History Category is small (13–14 students), so the influence of regional preference factors is limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 2112, the slight 7.1% enrollment reduction in 2026 easing competition, a slight decrease in total candidates, and stable popularity of liberal arts majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will move forward slightly compared to 2025. With limited adjustments considering the slight decrease in candidate numbers and stable liberal arts popularity, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2042, with a fluctuation range of 1674–2410.

- Law.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 2042, fluctuation range 1674–2410. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of 1674 can focus on Tier 1 majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Law); those around 2000 are advised to mainly consider Tier 2 majors (Economics and Trade, Business Administration); those near the upper limit of 2410 are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety options (Public Administration, Foreign Languages and Literature). Network and New Media is a new major in 2026 with lower popularity and can be considered as a new option.
